hero.badge: Now in Beta — free early access
hero.description: Type a theme or idea. Loritalk's AI writes optimized posts for Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, and more — in seconds. Multiple AI models compete to give you the best result.
hero.note: No credit card required · Free during Beta

items.title: Hours wasted adapting
items.description: You write a post for Instagram, then rewrite it for LinkedIn, then again for X. Every platform needs different tone, length, and hashtags.

items.title: AI that sounds generic
items.description: Single-model AI gives you one version that sounds like everyone else. No brand voice, no platform awareness, no real optimization.

items.title: Team bottlenecks
items.description: Content waits for approval, gets lost in Slack threads, and nobody knows what's scheduled for next week.

solution.title: Loritalk fixes all of that
solution.subtitle: One briefing. Every platform. Multiple AIs competing for your best post.

rows.before: 1 post = 45 min adapting to each platform

rows.after: Multiple AI models deliberate and refine each other

rows.before: Content scattered across tools and threads
rows.after: One dashboard: create, approve, schedule, publish, track

features.title: Everything your content team needs
features.subtitle: From idea to published post — Loritalk handles the entire workflow.

items.title: Multi-Model AI Deliberation
items.description: Not one AI — multiple models generate independently, then refine each other's work.

items.title: Platform-optimized content
items.description: Each post is tailored for its platform — right tone, length, hashtags, emojis, and format. Instagram captions, LinkedIn articles, X threads, TikTok scripts.

items.title: Multilingual generation
items.description: Generate in Portuguese, English, Spanish and more. Native-level fluency with cultural nuance — not just translation.

items.title: Schedule & publish
items.description: Calendar view, scheduled publishing, and direct posting to all connected channels. Different times per platform.

items.title: Brand voice & personas
items.description: Create AI personas that write like your brand. Control tone from professional to playful. Every post sounds like you, not a robot.

items.title: Analytics dashboard
items.description: Track impressions, engagement, clicks, and growth across all channels. Know what content works and double down.

howItWorks.title: From idea to post in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No more blank screens. No more copy-pasting between platforms.

steps.title: Write your briefing
steps.description: Describe what you want to communicate — as simple as "new product launch" or as detailed as a full brief. Pick your channels, language, and tone.

steps.title: AI models compete for you
steps.description: Multiple AI models generate content independently, then review and refine each other's output. You receive N polished versions per platform.

steps.title: Pick, edit & publish
steps.description: Choose your favorite version for each channel. Tweak anything with one click. Publish now or schedule for later.

differentiator.title: Why multiple AIs beat a single one
differentiator.subtitle: Other tools use one model. Loritalk uses several — and makes them improve each other.
differentiator.round2Desc: Each model reads all outputs and improves its own version
differentiator.explanation: Each AI version brings different strengths — creative range, analytical depth, and factual precision. By making them collaborate and refine each other's output, every final text reaches a quality no single model could achieve alone.

useCases.title: Built for teams that publish
useCases.subtitle: Whether you're a solo creator or a 50-person agency.

items.title: Solo creators & freelancers
items.description: Stop spending hours adapting content. Write once, publish everywhere. Focus on strategy, not copy-pasting.

items.title: Marketing teams
items.description: One workspace per brand. Approval workflows. Calendar view. Everyone knows what's publishing and when.

items.title: Agencies
items.description: Manage multiple brands from one account. Assign roles, control access, track performance across all clients. Unlimited posts on Agency plan.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free during Beta. Early users lock their rate forever when we launch.

plans.name: Creator
plans.description: For creators and brands that publish consistently.

items.a: Loritalk connects to multiple leading AI providers. You can configure which models participate in your generation pipeline.

items.q: How is this different from other AI tools?
items.a: Other AI tools give you one output from one model. Loritalk runs multiple models in parallel, then makes them refine each other's work — producing consistently higher quality. Plus, every post is automatically optimized for each specific platform.
LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), and TikTok.
Yes. Your content is never used to train AI models. All data is stored on our servers in Europe and processed under GDPR compliance.

items.q: Can I use it with my team?
items.a: Absolutely. Create workspaces for each brand, invite team members with admin or publisher roles, and set up approval workflows so nothing goes live without review.
Paid plans kick in, but every Beta user keeps their current rate locked forever. No surprises.

ctaBanner.headline: Stop writing. Start publishing.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Join the Beta — free access, no credit card, and your rate is locked forever when we launch.
